ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio feature */,
  "button_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature in button interactions */,
  "button_no_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature when no button interaction occurs */,
  "vocal_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature in vocal interactions */,
  "vocal_no_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature when no vocal interaction occurs */,
  "mean_importance" REAL /* Mean importance of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audio feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the audio feature (e.g., pitch, volume, tone) */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source or method of extraction for the feature (e.g., FFT, MFCC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "button_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the button */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio feature associated with the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the button interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of button interaction (e.g., press, hold) */,
  "interaction_duration" REAL /* Duration of the button interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the interaction (e.g., location, environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_button_interactions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_button_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_button_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocal_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocal interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted vocally */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio feature associated with the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the vocal interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of vocal interaction (e.g., command, query) */,
  "interaction_duration" REAL /* Duration of the vocal interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_transcript" TEXT /* Transcribed text of the vocal interaction */,
  "interaction_context" TEXT /* Additional context or metadata about the interaction (e.g., location, environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocal_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocal_interactions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocal_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin) */,
  "user_profile" TEXT /* User profile information (e.g., age, gender, interests) */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for system settings (e.g., language, theme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used during the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place (e.g., home, office) */,
  "session_activity" TEXT /* Main activity during the session (e.g., gaming, browsing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, smart speaker) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_operating_system FOREIGN KEY ("operating_system") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the performance was measured */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the system during the session */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of system responses during the session */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of system responses during the session */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "performance_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the performance during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the result was obtained */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction associated with the result */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio feature associated with the result */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric associated with the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics result (e.g., prediction, recommendation) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the analytics result */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analytics result */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics result (e.g., machine learning model, rule-based system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES button_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES system_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_example" TEXT /* Example of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the interaction type in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_types" (
  "result_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result type */,
  "result_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the result type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result type */,
  "result_example" TEXT /* Example of the result type */,
  "result_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the result type in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_privileges" TEXT /* Privileges associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "device_type_example" TEXT /* Example of the device type */,
  "device_type_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the device type in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "os_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the operating system */,
  "os_example" TEXT /* Example of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)
